summary: Dashboard schedule formatting still parses next_run inside a controller with raw strtotime instead of using AIPS_DateTime, which risks timezone drift and keeps date handling inconsistent with the bigint timestamp migration.
why_it_matters: Controllers should not own ad-hoc datetime parsing in this codebase. Using AIPS_DateTime keeps site timezone display and UTC storage rules consistent.
suggested_fix: Normalize next_run through AIPS_DateTime and keep presentation formatting in a helper or value object-aware path.
resolution: Replaced strtotime/get_gmt_from_date parsing path with AIPS_DateTime::fromMysqlOrNull() and AIPS_DateTime::now() timestamps in format_next_run().
